title: Floral Wreath Cookie Cutter - Medium 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool Spring Garden Cookies Flower Design Pastry Cutter Kitchen Tool
description:
Create stunning floral wreath cookies with this beautifully designed 3D-printed cookie cutter! Perfect for spring celebrations, garden parties, or any occasion that calls for elegant flower-themed treats. This medium-sized cutter produces cookies approximately 7-8cm in diameter, making them ideal for decorating, gift-giving, or serving at special events.

Crafted with precision 3D printing technology, this floral wreath cookie cutter features intricate petal details and a classic wreath silhouette that cuts cleanly through cookie dough, fondant, and other baking materials. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable handling while the sharp cutting edge delivers professional-looking results every time. The sturdy construction means this cutter will maintain its shape through countless baking sessions.

Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. The smooth finish makes cleaning easy – simply rinse with warm soapy water and dry thoroughly before storing.

To use, simply roll out your favorite cookie dough to about 6mm thickness, press the cutter firmly and evenly, then lift to reveal your perfectly shaped floral wreath cookies. Works wonderfully with sugar cookie dough, gingerbread, shortbread, and even salt dough for crafting projects. The clean lines make these cookies perfect for decorating with royal icing, buttercream, or simple dusting powder.

This floral wreath cookie cutter makes an exceptional gift for baking enthusiasts, professional bakers, or anyone who loves creating beautiful homemade treats. Perfect for Mother's Day celebrations, spring birthdays, bridal showers, or Easter gatherings. Teachers, grandmothers, and crafty friends will absolutely love receiving this thoughtful and practical present. It's also wonderful for adding to gift baskets alongside other baking supplies or pairing with cookie mix ingredients for a complete baking gift set.

About our shop: We specialize in creating high-quality, handmade 3D-printed baking tools in small batches to ensure attention to detail and consistent quality. Each item is printed to order using premium food-safe materials. We offer reliable shipping to both US and EU customers with careful packaging to ensure your items arrive in perfect condition.
